text.title: Shutdown Customer Email Pack Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path spec artefact
example.description: Solo founders sunsetting a paid product with real paying customers — the recurring high-emotion moment most founders postpone until it is too late. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated spec matching the output contract.
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-30day-notice drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
